item.name: Crepe Sole
item.description:
The story goes that it was named after an item of footwear. Whether or not this is true, the fact remains that it looks like it has been stepped on.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: A royal servant once remarked that this fish was astonishingly similar to an item of footwear, specifically a delicate sandal inadvertently kicked into the ocean by an overly excited sultan of Ul'dah.
